bugs.desc: query params not URL-encoded (injection / breakage on special chars)
no handling of trailing/leading slash -> double slash '//' in URL
HTTP header lookup is case-sensitive; must be case-insensitive
split('=') breaks cookie values containing '='; need maxsplit=1; value not stripped
only 200 treated ok; 201/204/2xx wrongly treated as failure
no content-type/empty-body check before json.loads -> crashes on non-JSON
'remember' flag bypasses expiry entirely -> expired sessions stay active
SQL injection via string concatenation; use parameterized query
limit concatenated into SQL; not validated/parameterized
open redirect: target not validated against an allowlist
startswith('http') also matches 'httpevil.com'; weak scheme check
bool('false') is True; string 'false'/'0' wrongly truthy
'in form' passes for empty-string values; presence != non-empty
